name: Jupyter Book
description: Jupyter Book — open-source tool for building beautiful, publication-quality books and documentation from Jupyter Notebooks and Markdown files.

seo.title: Jupyter Book — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: Jupyter Book: Jupyter Book — open-source tool for building beautiful, publication-quality books and documentation from Jupyter Notebooks and Markdown files.

when_to_use: Machine learning tutorial published as interactive book
Research paper with live executable code cells and outputs
Internal data engineering handbook built from notebooks
API reference documentation with embedded runnable examples
University course materials published as open web book

pros: Executes Jupyter notebooks directly in published book
Excellent fit for scientific and ML documentation
Free, open source, and actively maintained
Good static output via Sphinx ecosystem
cons: Build times grow with notebook count and execution
review.verdict: The right tool for executable, notebook-driven books; overkill for non-scientific developer docs.
review.best_for: Data science teams, ML researchers, and educators publishing reproducible notebook content.
review.not_for: General API docs, SaaS product docs, or teams without notebook-based content.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
